caption: The video features a hand-drawn animation on graph paper, depicting two figures with their arms raised in a gesture of unity or victory. The figure on the left is shaded with diagonal lines, while the one on the right remains unshaded. As the frames progress, the text at the bottom of the screen reads, "Arise sing. We are going to win. Flags of unity are now advancing," suggesting a theme of solidarity and triumph. The background music, credited to "Švic mikrofona 036," likely complements the uplifting message conveyed by the visuals. The overall style is simple yet powerful, using minimalistic art to convey a strong sense of collective spirit and determination.
